text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, come get into a nasty 
quarrel with me! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
See, I heard a rumor from a classmate. If two 
people confess their feelings for each other 
under the last tree lining the main walkway, 
they'll be inseparable for life.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But if their feelings don't align and it 
leads to a quarrel, they'll resent each 
other for life instead…

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So we must go and get into a quarrel! 
No jinx can stop us. We'll prove that we 
can still be just as close afterwards!
